Sigs are verified over all 2*N bid handles,         then the contract sorts bids descending by price and walks down         until supply is consumed; clearing price = last winning bid's         price; winners pay clearing*allocatedQty in cUSDC, losers refunded."}},"notice":"Sealed-bid auction supporting two modes:         - ITEM: single-winner. Highest bidder pays own bid in cUSDC.         - TOKEN: multi-winner uniform-clearing-price. Winners pay clearing           price * allocated quantity in cUSDC.         Settlement is two-step on Zama v0.11.1:           1. `endAuction` marks all relevant ciphertexts publicly decryptable.           2. Off-chain relayer fetches plaintext + KMS proof from the gateway.           3. `finalizeAuction*` calls verify the proof via FHE.checkSignatures,              then settle bids finalizeAuctionItem(uint256,address,uint.details: Caller supplies plaintexts fetched off-chain; checkSignatures         enforces correctness against the FHE handles.

params.priceProof: Proof binding `encExtPrice` to the bidder + this contract.
params.qtyProof: Proof binding `encExtQty` to the bidder + this contract.                   Ignored for ITEM mode (qty is constant 1 internally).

finalizeAuctionItem(uint256,address,uint.notice: ITEM-mode finalize. Verifies KMS signatures over the running         highest bidder + amount, then settles every bid: winner pays         seller (minus fee) from their own escrow, losers refunded fully.

finalizeAuctionToken(uint256,uint64[],ui.notice: TOKEN-mode finalize. Caller supplies plaintext (price, qty) pairs         in bid-index order. Sigs are verified over all 2*N bid handles,         then the contract sorts bids descending by price and walks down         until supply is consumed; clearing price = last winning bid's         price; winners pay clearing*allocatedQty in cUSDC, losers refunded.
